## Feature Status

| Feature | State | Tests | QA Action |
|---------|-------|-------|-----------|
| feature_alpha | TODO | None | Not ready for QA |
| feature_beta | TODO | None | Not ready for QA |
| feature_gamma | TODO | None | Not ready for QA |
| **feature_delta** | **Ready for Verification** | PASS (1/1) | **Needs QA review** |
| **feature_epsilon** | **Ready for Verification** | PASS (1/1) | **Needs QA review** |
| feature_eta | Complete | PASS (1/1) | Al
